factors.rationale: The product is the dominant focal point and easily identifiable.
The accessory is shown being held, indicating a clear use case.
The design suggests specific benefits like protection and style.
The arrangement is clear, with no distracting elements.
Material quality and texture are clearly visible.
The brand name is visible, providing a trust signal.
Strong contrast and clear boundaries enhance readability.
The image is polished but lacks clear campaign context.
